project.name: DevKey
project.description: Open-source Android keyboard combining Hacker's Keyboard power-user features with modern SwiftKey-inspired UX, AI prediction, and command-aware autocorrect

current_phase.name: Session 5 Implemented — v1 Feature-Complete
current_phase.details: All 5 implementation sessions complete. Code review + cleanup done. Build passing, 28 tests passing.

active_blockers: Whisper model files (whisper-tiny.en.tflite + filters_vocab_en.bin) need to be downloaded from GitHub repos

metadata.session_notes: Session 12: Implemented Session 5 (all 9 phases). Ran 3-agent code review + fixers + Round 2 review + manual fixes. Deleted dead files, updated branding to DevKey, wrote ProGuard rules, enabled resource shrinking and lint. Build passing, 28 unit tests passing. v1 feature-complete.
